blocks.name: edit_file

blocks.output:
{
  "filePath": "/Users/linux4life/dev/front-porch-AI/lib/services/llm_provider.dart",
  "oldString": "  void _syncFromStorage() {\n    final typeStr = _storageService.backendType;\n    final newType = typeStr == 'openRouter' ? BackendType.openRouter : BackendType.kobold;\n\n    // Update OpenRouter config\n    _openRouterService.configure(\n      apiUrl: _storageService.remoteApiUrl,\n      apiKey: _storageService.remoteApiKey,\n      modelName: _storageService.remoteModelName,\n    );\n\n    if (newType != _activeBackend) {\n      _activeBackend = newType;\n      notifyListeners();\n    }\n  }",
  "newString": "  void _syncFromStorage() {\n    final typeStr = _storageService.backendType;\n    final newType = typeStr == 'openRouter' ? BackendType.openRouter : BackendType.kobold;\n\n    // Update OpenRouter config with persisted values\n    _openRouterService.configure(\n      apiUrl: _storageService.remoteApiUrl,\n      apiKey: _storageService.remoteApiKey,\n      modelName: _storageService.remoteModelName,\n    );\n    debugPrint('[LLMProvider] Synced from storage: backend=$typeStr, URL=${_storageService.remoteApiUrl}');\n\n    if (newType != _activeBackend) {\n      _activeBackend = newType;\n      notifyListeners();\n    }\n  }",
  "originalFile": "// Copyright (C) 2026 Front Porch AI\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later\n//\n// This file is part of Front Porch AI.\n//\n// Front Porch AI is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify\n// it under the terms of the GNU Affero General Public License as published by\n// the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or\n// (at your option) any later version.\n//\n// Front Porch AI is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,\n// but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of\n// MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the\n// GNU Affero General Public License for more details.\n//\n// You should have received a copy of the GNU Affero General Public License\n// along with Front Porch AI. If not, see <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.\n\nimport 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';\nimport 'package:front_porch_ai/services/llm_service.dart';\nimport 'package:front_porch_ai/services/kobold_service.dart';\nimport 'package:front_porch_ai/services/open_router_service.dart';\nimport 'package:front_porch_ai/services/storage_service.dart';\n\n/// The available backend types.\nenum BackendType { kobold, openRouter }\n\n/// Manages switching between LLM backends (local KoboldCPP vs remote APIs).\n///\n/// Sits between ChatService and the actual backend implementations.\n/// Listens to StorageService for config changes and hot-swaps the active service.\nclass LLMProvider extends ChangeNotifier {\n  final KoboldService _koboldService;\n  final OpenRouterService _openRouterService;\n  final StorageService _storageService;\n\n  BackendType _activeBackend = BackendType.kobold;\n\n  BackendType get activeBackend => _activeBackend;\n  LLMService get activeService =>\n      _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold ? _koboldService : _openRouterService;\n\n  /// Whether the currently active backend is the local KoboldCPP.\n  bool get isLocal => _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold;\n\n  /// Convenience getters for the underlying services (for UI that needs specifics).\n  KoboldService get koboldService => _koboldService;\n  OpenRouterService get openRouterService => _openRouterService;\n\n  LLMProvider(this._koboldService, this._openRouterService, this._storageService) {\n    // Sync from persisted settings\n    _syncFromStorage();\n    _storageService.addListener(_syncFromStorage);\n  }\n\n  @override\n  void dispose() {\n    _storageService.removeListener(_syncFromStorage);\n    super.dispose();\n  }\n\n  void _syncFromStorage() {\n    final typeStr = _storageService.backendType;\n    final newType = typeStr == 'openRouter' ? BackendType.openRouter : BackendType.kobold;\n\n    // Update OpenRouter config\n    _openRouterService.configure(\n      apiUrl: _storageService.remoteApiUrl,\n      apiKey: _storageService.remoteApiKey,\n      modelName: _storageService.remoteModelName,\n    );\n\n    if (newType != _activeBackend) {\n      _activeBackend = newType;\n      notifyListeners();\n    }\n  }\n\n  /// Switch the active backend and persist the choice.\n  /// Returns `true` if KoboldCPP was running and got shut down.\n  Future<bool> setActiveBackend(BackendType type) async {\n    if (type == _activeBackend) return false;\n\n    bool stoppedKobold = false;\n\n    // Auto-shutdown KoboldCPP when switching away from local\n    if (type == BackendType.openRouter && _koboldService.isRunning) {\n      await _koboldService.stopKobold();\n      stoppedKobold = true;\n    }\n\n    _activeBackend = type;\n    await _storageService.setBackendType(\n        type == BackendType.openRouter ? 'openRouter' : 'kobold');\n    notifyListeners();\n    return stoppedKobold;\n  }\n}\n",
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "oldStart": 1,
      "oldLines": 98,
      "newStart": 1,
      "newLines": 99,
      "lines": [
        "-// Copyright (C) 2026 Front Porch AI",

        "-// it under the terms of the GNU Affero General Public License as published by",
        "-// the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or",
        "-// (at your option) any later version.",
        "-//",
        "-// Front Porch AI is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,",
        "-// but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of",
        "-// MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the",
        "-// GNU Affero General Public License for more details.",
        "-//",
        "-// You should have received a copy of the GNU Affero General Public License",
        "-// along with Front Porch AI. If not, see <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.",
        "-",
        "-import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';",
        "-import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/llm_service.dart';",
        "-import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/kobold_service.dart';",
        "-import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/open_router_service.dart';",
        "-import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/storage_service.dart';",
        "-",
        "-/// The available backend types.",
        "-enum BackendType { kobold, openRouter }",
        "-",
        "-/// Manages switching between LLM backends (local KoboldCPP vs remote APIs).",
        "-///",
        "-/// Sits between ChatService and the actual backend implementations.",
        "-/// Listens to StorageService for config changes and hot-swaps the active service.",
        "-class LLMProvider extends ChangeNotifier {",
        "-  final KoboldService _koboldService;",
        "-  final OpenRouterService _openRouterService;",
        "-  final StorageService _storageService;",
        "-",
        "-  BackendType _activeBackend = BackendType.kobold;",
        "-",
        "-  BackendType get activeBackend => _activeBackend;",
        "-  LLMService get activeService =>",
        "-      _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold ? _koboldService : _openRouterService;",
        "-",
        "-  /// Whether the currently active backend is the local KoboldCPP.",
        "-  bool get isLocal => _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold;",
        "-",
        "-  /// Convenience getters for the underlying services (for UI that needs specifics).",
        "-  KoboldService get koboldService => _koboldService;",
        "-  OpenRouterService get openRouterService => _openRouterService;",
        "-",
        "-  LLMProvider(this._koboldService, this._openRouterService, this._storageService) {",
        "-    // Sync from persisted settings",
        "-    _syncFromStorage();",
        "-    _storageService.addListener(_syncFromStorage);",
        "-  }",
        "-",
        "-  @override",
        "-  void dispose() {",
        "-    _storageService.removeListener(_syncFromStorage);",
        "-    super.dispose();",
        "-  }",
        "-",
        "-  void _syncFromStorage() {",
        "-    final typeStr = _storageService.backendType;",
        "-    final newType = typeStr == 'openRouter' ? BackendType.openRouter : BackendType.kobold;",
        "-",
        "-    // Update OpenRouter config",
        "-    _openRouterService.configure(",
        "-      apiUrl: _storageService.remoteApiUrl,",
        "-      apiKey: _storageService.remoteApiKey,",
        "-      modelName: _storageService.remoteModelName,",
        "-    );",
        "-",
        "-    if (newType != _activeBackend) {",
        "-      _activeBackend = newType;",
        "-      notifyListeners();",
        "-    }",
        "-  }",
        "-",
        "-  /// Switch the active backend and persist the choice.",
        "-  /// Returns `true` if KoboldCPP was running and got shut down.",
        "-  Future<bool> setActiveBackend(BackendType type) async {",
        "-    if (type == _activeBackend) return false;",
        "-",
        "-    bool stoppedKobold = false;",
        "-",
        "-    // Auto-shutdown KoboldCPP when switching away from local",
        "-    if (type == BackendType.openRouter && _koboldService.isRunning) {",
        "-      await _koboldService.stopKobold();",
        "-      stoppedKobold = true;",
        "-    }",
        "-",
        "-    _activeBackend = type;",
        "-    await _storageService.setBackendType(",
        "-        type == BackendType.openRouter ? 'openRouter' : 'kobold');",
        "-    notifyListeners();",
        "-    return stoppedKobold;",
        "-  }",
        "-}",
        "+// Copyright (C) 2026 Front Porch AI",
        "+// SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0-or-later",
        "+//",
        "+// This file is part of Front Porch AI.",
        "+//",
        "+// Front Porch AI is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify",
        "+// it under the terms of the GNU Affero General Public License as published by",
        "+// the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or",
        "+// (at your option) any later version.",
        "+//",
        "+// Front Porch AI is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,",
        "+// but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of",
        "+// MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the",
        "+// GNU Affero General Public License for more details.",
        "+//",
        "+// You should have received a copy of the GNU Affero General Public License",
        "+// along with Front Porch AI. If not, see <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.",
        "+",
        "+import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';",
        "+import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/llm_service.dart';",
        "+import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/kobold_service.dart';",
        "+import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/open_router_service.dart';",
        "+import 'package:front_porch_ai/services/storage_service.dart';",
        "+",
        "+/// The available backend types.",
        "+enum BackendType { kobold, openRouter }",
        "+",
        "+/// Manages switching between LLM backends (local KoboldCPP vs remote APIs).",
        "+///",
        "+/// Sits between ChatService and the actual backend implementations.",
        "+/// Listens to StorageService for config changes and hot-swaps the active service.",
        "+class LLMProvider extends ChangeNotifier {",
        "+  final KoboldService _koboldService;",
        "+  final OpenRouterService _openRouterService;",
        "+  final StorageService _storageService;",
        "+",
        "+  BackendType _activeBackend = BackendType.kobold;",
        "+",
        "+  BackendType get activeBackend => _activeBackend;",
        "+  LLMService get activeService =>",
        "+      _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold ? _koboldService : _openRouterService;",
        "+",
        "+  /// Whether the currently active backend is the local KoboldCPP.",
        "+  bool get isLocal => _activeBackend == BackendType.kobold;",
        "+",
        "+  /// Convenience getters for the underlying services (for UI that needs specifics).",
        "+  KoboldService get koboldService => _koboldService;",
        "+  OpenRouterService get openRouterService => _openRouterService;",
        "+",
        "+  LLMProvider(this._koboldService, this._openRouterService, this._storageService) {",
        "+    // Sync from persisted settings",
        "+    _syncFromStorage();",
        "+    _storageService.addListener(_syncFromStorage);",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  @override",
        "+  void dispose() {",
        "+    _storageService.removeListener(_syncFromStorage);",
        "+    super.dispose();",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  void _syncFromStorage() {",
        "+    final typeStr = _storageService.backendType;",
        "+    final newType = typeStr == 'openRouter' ? BackendType.openRouter : BackendType.kobold;",
        "+",
        "+    // Update OpenRouter config with persisted values",
        "+    _openRouterService.configure(",
        "+      apiUrl: _storageService.remoteApiUrl,",
        "+      apiKey: _storageService.remoteApiKey,",
        "+      modelName: _storageService.remoteModelName,",
        "+    );",
        "+    debugPrint('[LLMProvider] Synced from storage: backend=$typeStr, URL=${_storageService.remoteApiUrl}');",
        "+",
        "+    if (newType != _activeBackend) {",
        "+      _activeBackend = newType;",
        "+      notifyListeners();",
        "+    }",
        "+  }",
        "+",
        "+  /// Switch the active backend and persist the choice.",
        "+  /// Returns `true` if KoboldCPP was running and got shut down.",
        "+  Future<bool> setActiveBackend(BackendType type) async {",
        "+    if (type == _activeBackend) return false;",
        "+",
        "+    bool stoppedKobold = false;",
        "+",
        "+    // Auto-shutdown KoboldCPP when switching away from local",
        "+    if (type == BackendType.openRouter && _koboldService.isRunning) {",
        "+      await _koboldService.stopKobold();",
        "+      stoppedKobold = true;",
        "+    }",
        "+",
        "+    _activeBackend = type;",
        "+    await _storageService.setBackendType(",
        "+        type == BackendType.openRouter ? 'openRouter' : 'kobold');",
        "+    notifyListeners();",
        "+    return stoppedKobold;",
        "+  }",
        "+}"
      ]
    }
  ],

}

blocks.text: Now let's enhance the backend switch logic to provide better feedback and ensure the API settings are explicitly logged as preserved:

when switching between LM studio and remote API the existing API key for the remote provider remains in the input box however when I click on check connection the app outputs "API key is empty" when the API key is clearly in the input box from its last use. this means that the API key is not actually being saved, or it is not being read after switching from nano-gpt, open router to LM studio option and then back to openrouter/nano-gpt
